name: LORAL SPACE + COMM. INC.
summary: Loral Space & Communications Inc. is a satellite communications company that provides satellite-based services, including broadcast, enterprise, and government solutions. The company's services include satellite capacity, managed services, and teleport facilities. TICKER: Loral Space & Communications Inc. provides satellite-based services, including broadcast, enterprise, and government solutions, offering satellite capacity, managed services, and teleport facilities.
